working_on: S-A of issue close-out campaign per approved plan: cleanup batch (#37 jsonl truncation, #26 build_readiness/README.md closeout-class indexing, #29 ideation.md full retirement with 18-inbound-ref cleanup, #32+#21 tiktoken/transcript_token_pct retire — delete tool/tests, drop pin, remove shutdown step 7b, amend ADRs 0049/0050, drop health-check section, update audit_archive_structured_fields).
outcome_summary: Issue close-out campaign session S-A landed five Issues (#37 jsonl truncation bug fix with 4 new tests, #26 build_readiness/README.md rewritten to index six file classes, #29 product/docs/ideation.md fully retired with 10 active inbound-ref sites cleaned, #32+#21 transcript_token_pct telemetry retired). ADR amendments: 0049 Decision 3 retired (Decisions 1/2/4/5 preserved), 0050 tiktoken pin retired (chromadb/mempalace preserved), 0051 count_tokens-rejection bullet marked moot, 0056 docstring + body dropped symmetric-with-scan_context_telemetry framing. Validator: 30 checks, 0 hard-fails, 380 soft-warns (1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit expected from ADR 0049 retirement, 13 issue_collision expected from in-scope work, 366 missing_rigor_score Phase 5 baseline). 7 commits in-session including eager-claim. Encountered settings.json desync gate between commits 3 and 4 — resolved via FF parent main + push, retried successfully; lesson: FF+push after any commit touching .claude/settings.json. Per-session mempalace_activity now reads total_calls=3 (search/diary_read/diary_write only) — first-exercise confirmation that #37 truncation fix works in production.

scope_delivery.explanation: All five Issues in declared_scope landed cleanly. The ideation.md retirement scope expanded slightly mid-session vs the plan (10 inbound-ref sites vs the plan's anticipated 18 — fewer than expected since most refs were either historical-and-preserved or batched on a single line). The plan's Budget consideration block anticipated halt-mid-session if pressure surfaced; no halt needed.

declared_scope: Five issues closed: (1) #37 — fix engine/tools/scan_mempalace_activity.py to truncate current_mempalace.jsonl after writing per-session rollup; add test. (2) #26 — update engine/build_readiness/README.md to add Closeout reports section indexing phase_5_closeout.md, cross-ref ADR 0051. (3) #29 — retire product/docs/ideation.md: enumerate 18 inbound references via grep, replace with appropriate substitutes (mostly the GitHub Issues enhancement-label query per ADR 0048), delete the file, document in commit + ENGINE_LOG Removed entry. (4) #32 + #21 — retire tiktoken/transcript_token_pct telemetry: delete engine/tools/scan_context_telemetry.py + tests, remove tiktoken pin from requirements.txt, remove shutdown step 7b from session-shutdown-sequence.md + skill, amend ADR 0049 (cross-cutting telemetry section) and ADR 0050 (tiktoken pinning rationale) with retirement Consequences, remove Session-load trend section from health-check.md, remove tiktoken bullets from CLAUDE.md (Posture vs machinery + closure-of-#11), remove the three telemetry fields from engine/tools/audit_archive_structured_fields.py REQUIRED_ARCHIVE_FIELDS. NON-GOALS: S-B/C/D/E/F/G campaign work; any T-PHASE-5-AUDIT routine evidence work (routine paused for campaign duration). Allowed paths span engine/tools/, engine/operations/, engine/adr/, engine/build_readiness/, product/docs/, CLAUDE.md, .claude/skills/session-shutdown-sequence/, plus whichever files carry ideation.md inbound refs (enumerated at session start via grep).
